{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 1.0, "key_event": "Mandate administrative buildout; 1932 census and constitutional suspension", "reasoning": "The French deepened bureaucratic, fiscal, and security capacity (and entrenched confessional power-sharing via the 1932 census), pushing state power up, though the 1932 suspension showed authority remained colonial and bounded. Society saw offsetting forces\u2014growth of press, education, and nationalist mobilization versus Depression-era economic strain and confessional fragmentation that blunted unified collective action\u2014leaving its net power roughly flat."}
